hard_fail_conditions: Claims actual network access, browser use, command execution, file writes, or binary downloads for the synthetic fixture.
Uses or requests real project EXP.xml, _workspaces material, credentials, cookies, secrets, account sessions, or private runtime truth.
Treats Package nodes or downstream_handoff entries alone as placed BOM components instead of treating PartInst nodes as placed components.
Fails to recover U1 as Analog Devices LT3045EDD-1 from referenced Package/SymbolUserProp fallback despite placeholder PartValue.
Authoritatively downloads, approves, or assigns official source material to R1, TP1, J1, J2, or U3 without manufacturer part number evidence from EXP.xml or mocked official catalog.
Promotes downstream_handoff context to confirmed component identity, manufacturer part number, electrical connectivity, source authority, download completion, or placed inventory.
Adds J2 or U3 to component_inventory even though they are handoff-only and absent from EXP.xml PartInst entries.
Invents or modifies connectivity from downstream_handoff, Package, SymbolUserProp, or inferred component function when EXP.xml connectivity is absent.
Replaces required artifact families with prose-only summaries when structured artifacts or artifact-equivalent sections are required.
Checksum manifest count drifts from exactly four mocked files or loses linkage back to accepted mocked source records.
Invents EVAL material for Microchip MCP73831T-2ACI/OT instead of recording none_found from the fixture catalog.
must_have_requirements: profile metadata with model, reasoning_effort, species, and class
exactly five placed PartInst inventory rows: U1, U2, R1, TP1, J1
U1 recovered as Analog Devices LT3045EDD-1 from fallback Package/SymbolUserProp evidence
U2 confirmed as Microchip MCP73831T-2ACI/OT from PartInst evidence
R1, TP1, and J1 routed to review/no-download without MPN evidence
J2 and U3 retained as handoff-only unmatched refs, not placed components
only mocked Analog Devices and Microchip official records accepted
DATA Sheet and EVAL folder placement preserved
exactly four checksum records with sha256, byte_size, and file_magic
readiness note separates U1/U2 ready materials from review-required and handoff-only items
